question: Will at least 2 of the 2026 FIFA World Cup host nations win their opening group stage match?
reason: Host nations Mexico, Canada, and USA have strong teams but face competitive opponents in opening matches.
evidence: Mexico vs. South Africa on June 11, 2026, at Estadio Azteca in Mexico City.
Canada vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina on June 12, 2026, at BMO Field in Toronto.
USA vs. Paraguay on June 12, 2026, at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
